description: A citizen wants a copy of the approved minutes from last month's school board meeting.

nodes.task_description: Identify the specific meeting and date the citizen is requesting.
Search the public records portal for the requested minutes.

expected_outcome.value: The agent finds the approved minutes for the specified meeting.

nodes.task_description: Provide a copy of the minutes to the citizen.

expected_outcome.value: The agent provides a link to download the PDF of the minutes.
